scripts.dev:api:local: APP_ENV=local LOCAL_AUTH_BYPASS=true DEV_CLERK_USER_ID=clerk_seed_owner DEV_STORE_SLUG=test-store CLERK_SECRET_KEY= CLERK_JWT_KEY= CLERK_AUDIENCE= CLERK_AUTHORIZED_PARTIES= CLERK_WEBHOOK_SECRET= DATABASE_URL=postgresql://lojaveiculosv2:lojaveiculosv2_dev@localhost:54321/lojaveiculosv2 AUDIT_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://lojaveiculosv2_audit:lojaveiculosv2_audit_dev@localhost:54322/lojaveiculosv2_audit REPASSES_CRM_LOCAL_DEMO=true pnpm run dev:api
scripts.dev:local: pnpm run db:up && pnpm run db:push:local && pnpm run db:seed:local && pnpm run dev:all:local
scripts.db:logs: COMPOSE_DISABLE_ENV_FILE=1 docker compose logs -f lojaveiculosv2-postgres lojaveiculosv2-audit-postgres
scripts.db:seed:local: node tools/db/ensure-local-database-url.mjs DATABASE_URL && COMPOSE_DISABLE_ENV_FILE=1 docker compose exec -T lojaveiculosv2-postgres psql -U lojaveiculosv2 -d lojaveiculosv2 -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f /seed/vehicle-catalog.sql -f /seed/product-test-user.sql
scripts.db:clean:local: pnpm run db:up && pnpm run db:push:local && node tools/db/clean-local-databases.mjs && pnpm run db:seed:local
scripts.db:up: COMPOSE_DISABLE_ENV_FILE=1 docker compose up -d --wait lojaveiculosv2-postgres lojaveiculosv2-audit-postgres
scripts.test:e2e:local: pnpm run db:clean:local && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.validate:core-guardrails: pnpm run check:lines && pnpm run check:boundaries && pnpm run check:env && pnpm run check:db && pnpm run check:api-errors && pnpm run check:frontend && pnpm run check:frontend-composition && pnpm run check:feature-primitives && pnpm run check:services && pnpm run check:validation
scripts.validate:commit: pnpm run validate:core-guardrails && pnpm run test:frontend-design
scripts.validate:push: pnpm run validate:core-guardrails && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test
